# Auto Update

Tabletos automatically ships with an auto update service that will automatically update any packages you have installed via the [App Manager](../Installing%20Apps).

You can disable the auto update service for the current session by doing the following:

1. Open the System app
2. Choose the Service Manager page
3. Press the `Stop` button next to the auto update service entry

Enable it again by pressing the `Start` button

You can disable it across restarts by setting the autostart dropdown to "no", overriding the default of autostarting.

__Note__: this will only auto-update external packages, and not core apps or services.
